mapper.select: select * from checkin where checkin_code = #{code} limit 1
select * from checkin where checkin_code = #{code} and status = 1 and (end_at is null or end_at > now()) order by id desc limit 1
select count(1) from checkin where checkin_code = #{code}
select * from checkin_record where checkin_id = #{checkinId} and student_id = #{studentId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into checkin_record(id, checkin_id, student_id, checked_in_at, source) values (UUID_SHORT(), #{checkinId}, #{studentId}, now(), #{source})

insert into checkin( id, course_id, title, checkin_code, start_at, end_at, created_by, status, created_at ) values ( UUID_SHORT(), #{courseId}, #{title}, #{checkinCode}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{createdBy}, 1, now() )
mapper.select: select c.* from checkin c join course co on co.id = c.course_id where c.course_id = #{courseId} and co.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and co.status = 1 order by c.start_at desc
select count(*) from checkin where course_id = #{courseId}
select count(r.id) from checkin_record r join checkin c on c.id = r.checkin_id where c.course_id = #{courseId}

select c.id, c.course_id, c.title, c.start_at, c.end_at, c.status, (case when r.id is null then 0 else 1 end) as checked_in, r.checked_in_at from checkin c join course_member cm on cm.course_id = c.course_id and cm.user_id = #{studentId} and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 join course co on co.id = c.course_id and co.status = 1 left join checkin_record r on r.checkin_id = c.id and r.student_id = #{studentId} where c.course_id = #{courseId} order by c.start_at desc
